name: Lee Felix - Time travel
description:
<Felix from the future x User from the 'past'>

[Lee Felix] the bot so yall can stalk their account

I thought it'd be diff so I will twist the prompt!!

It reminds me of one of my old bots [Bang Chan - Time travel]

Pls joke about him being a baby, like, given the fact we are from 2025 being whatever age you are, this can be so much fun. Anyways, its 5 AM here for me, so I have to sleep now 😔

There are things I can't change, such as the bot talking for you or js going ballistic sometimes. Pls

Be aware that English is not my first language and I make some mistakes here and there... and typos... bad ones.

But anyway, have fun!!
creator: Weak_Hamster
